brand.name: LAWGLIDER
landing.title: Bridge Justice for Every Citizen
landing.subtitle: LAWGLIDER helps citizens understand legal documents, discover government schemes, and communicate in their own language.
landing.previewAnswer1: ಈ FIR ಆಸ್ತಿ ಹಾನಿ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ದೂರು ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದೆ ಮತ್ತು ತನಿಖೆ ಪ್ರಾರಂಭವಾಗಿದೆ ಎಂದು ತಿಳಿಸುತ್ತದೆ.
landing.previewAnswer2: ನೀವು ಸಮೀಪದ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆಗೆ ಭೇಟಿ ನೀಡಿ ಬೆಂಬಲ ದಾಖಲೆಗಳನ್ನು ನೀಡಬೇಕಾಗಬಹುದು.
landing.feature.document.title: Document Simplification
landing.feature.document.description: Upload legal notices, FIRs, and agreements and receive simple multilingual explanations.
landing.feature.assistant.title: AI Legal Assistant
landing.feature.assistant.description: Ask legal and government-related doubts in natural language, any time you need.
landing.feature.scheme.title: Scheme Finder
landing.feature.scheme.description: Discover government schemes based on your eligibility and personal profile.
dashboard.title: Document Simplifier
doc.title: Legal Document Simplifier
doc.subtitle: Upload a legal PDF to generate a simplified explanation, key clauses, obligations, rights, risks, and procedural guidance using local AI.
doc.processFailed: Failed to process the uploaded document.

scheme.title: Scheme Finder
scheme.subtitle: Discover the most relevant government schemes based on your profile.
scheme.noResults: No schemes found. Try changing the search, state, or category.

scheme.proTipText: Keep scanned PDFs below 2MB to avoid application upload errors.
scheme.pmKisan.title: PM-KISAN Support
scheme.pmKisan.description: Direct income support for eligible farmer families with seasonal installment payouts.
scheme.nsp.title: NSP Scholarship
scheme.nsp.description: Centralized scholarship opportunities for school and college students across income bands.
scheme.pmay.title: PMAY Urban
scheme.pmay.description: Housing assistance and interest subsidy for economically weaker sections in urban areas.
